ideation: This sequence will show the robot gently lifting its arms upward, as if admiring a ladybug, then bringing them back down.  The movement should be slow and deliberate, reflecting a sense of careful observation.  The arms will move symmetrically.  The wrists will remain neutral. Frame 1: Arms start at the sides, palms facing inward. Frame 2: Arms rise to approximately chest height. Frame 3: Arms reach their highest point, just below shoulder level. Frame 4: Arms descend to chest height again. Frame 5: Arms return to their resting position.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, palms inward
arms slowly lift to chest height
arms reach up, admiring something small
arms descend back to chest height
arms return to rest, observation complete
